title: crataegus laevigata subsp. nemorensis
intro: Crataegus laevigata subsp. nemorensis, also known as the smooth hawthorn, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects, making it useful for treating cardiovascular issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Crataegus laevigata subsp. nemorensis include lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and reducing the risk of heart disease, as well as its potential to aid in weight management and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and wellness.
